get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of Kafka message processing records. Default sort: lastAttemptAt DESC (most recently attempted first), then createdAt DESC. Supports filtering, sorting, and search.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of records to return (max 50)

200.description: Kafka message processing records retrieved successfully

X-Total-Count.description: Total number of Kafka message processing records

get.summary: List Kafka message processing records with pagination, filtering, sorting, and search

post.description: Retries processing multiple messages that failed with status ERROR. Each message is retried independently.
post.summary: Retry multiple failed messages in batch

post.description: Manually sends a message to a Kafka topic and creates a tracking record. The message will be logged and tracked just like messages sent via the producer service.

requestBody.description: Request body for producing a Kafka message. Payload field accepts any JSON structure depending on the topic.

payload.description: Message payload - accepts any JSON value (object, array, string, number, boolean, null). Structure varies by topic.

post.summary: Produce a message to any Kafka topic

get.description: Retrieves a single Kafka message processing record by its UUID.

200.description: Kafka message processing record retrieved successfully

get.summary: Get a Kafka message processing record by ID

post.description: Retries processing a Kafka message that previously failed. The message will be reprocessed using either the stored payload or an optional custom payload provided in the request body. Returns the updated message record with the final processing status.

requestBody.description: Optional request body. If provided, can contain a custom payload to use for retry instead of the stored payload. Body can be empty object {} or omitted entirely to use stored payload.

payload.description: Optional custom payload to use for retry. If provided, translation will be skipped and this payload will be used directly.

200.description: Message retry initiated successfully. Returns the updated message record with final status (PROCESSED or ERROR).

409.description: Message cannot be retried (e.g., already PROCESSED and not retryable)

get.description: Returns all Kafka services from database with runtime state (if registered). No credentials or sensitive data exposed.

200.description: List of services with runtime state

get.summary: List all Kafka services with runtime state

post.description: Starts a registered Kafka service by ID. Idempotent operation - safe to call multiple times.
Stops a registered Kafka service by ID. Idempotent operation - safe to call multiple times.
Enables a Kafka service by ID. Persists enabled = true in database and starts the service immediately. Idempotent operation - safe to call multiple times.

Disables a Kafka service by ID. Persists enabled = false in database and stops the service immediately. Disabled services will NOT start automatically on next deployment. Idempotent operation - safe to call multiple times.
Starts all Kafka services that have enabled = true in the database.
Stops all Kafka services that are currently running.
Enables all Kafka services (sets enabled = true) and starts them.
Disables all Kafka services (sets enabled = false) and stops any that are running.

post.description: Immediately executes a job, regardless of its schedule.
Disables scheduling for a job. The job will not run until resumed.
Enables scheduling for a paused job.

get.description: Returns aggregated API metrics grouped by time bucket (minute/hour/day).

parameters.name: route
parameters.description: Filter by route(s). Supports single value, array, or comma-separated list (e.g. route=/v1/agents,/v1/agents/:id). Works regardless of query parser collapsing repeated params.

parameters.name: method
parameters.description: Filter by HTTP method(s). Supports single value, array, or comma-separated list (e.g. method=GET,POST). Works regardless of query parser collapsing repeated params.

parameters.name: statusCode
parameters.description: Filter by HTTP status code(s). Supports single value, array, or comma-separated list (e.g. statusCode=200,404). Works regardless of query parser collapsing repeated params.

parameters.name: timeBucket
parameters.description: Time bucket for aggregation. If not provided, automatically selected based on time range: < 1 hour → minute, 1-24 hours → hour, > 24 hours → day

get.description: Returns aggregated statistics per route (request count, error rate, latency percentiles).

parameters.name: startTime
parameters.description: Start time for the query (defaults to 15 minutes ago if not provided)

parameters.name: endTime
parameters.description: End time for the query (defaults to now if not provided)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return (ranking mode only). Default: 50, Max: 100. When route filter is present, this switches to inspection mode and limit is ignored.

parameters.name: debug
parameters.description: Enable debug mode to log filters, row counts, and cap application (non-breaking, DEBUG level only)

parameters.name: route
parameters.description: Filter by route(s). Supports single value, array, or comma-separated list (e.g. route=/v1/agents,/v1/agents/:id). Works regardless of query parser collapsing repeated route= params.

parameters.name: method
parameters.description: Filter by HTTP method(s). Supports single value, array, or comma-separated list (e.g. method=GET,POST). Works regardless of query parser collapsing repeated params.

parameters.name: statusCode
parameters.description: Filter by HTTP status code(s). Supports single value, array, or comma-separated list (e.g. statusCode=200,404). Works regardless of query parser collapsing repeated params.

get.description: Returns top external callers (actors) by request count. Supports cursor-based pagination.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return. Use -1 or 0 to fetch all results (no limit).

parameters.name: startTime
parameters.description: Start time for the query (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: endTime
parameters.description: End time for the query (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: actorId
parameters.description: Filter by actor ID(s). Supports single value or array for multi-select.

parameters.name: route
parameters.description: Filter by route(s). Supports single value, array, or comma-separated list (e.g. route=/v1/agents,/v1/agents/:id). Works regardless of query parser collapsing repeated params.

parameters.name: statusCode
parameters.description: Filter by HTTP status code(s). Supports single value, array, or comma-separated list (e.g. statusCode=200,404). Works regardless of query parser collapsing repeated params.

parameters.name: debug
parameters.description: Enable debug mode to log filters, row counts, and cap application (non-breaking, DEBUG level only)

get.description: Returns recent API requests for a specific actor. Supports cursor-based pagination.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return. Use -1 or 0 to fetch all results (no limit).

parameters.name: legacyLimit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results (deprecated, use limit)

parameters.name: route
parameters.description: Filter by route(s). Supports single value or array for multi-select.

parameters.name: statusCode
parameters.description: Filter by HTTP status code(s). Supports single value or array for multi-select.

parameters.name: debug
parameters.description: Enable debug mode to log filters, row counts, and cap application (non-breaking, DEBUG level only)

get.description: Returns sample error logs for analysis and debugging. Supports cursor-based pagination.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return. Use -1 or 0 to fetch all results (no limit).

parameters.name: classification
parameters.description: Filter by error classification(s). Supports single value, array, or comma-separated list (e.g. classification=CLIENT_ERROR,SERVER_ERROR).

parameters.name: route
parameters.description: Filter by route(s). Supports single value, array, or comma-separated list (e.g. route=/v1/agents,/v1/countries). Note: repeated route= params may collapse to one value by the query parser; use comma-separated for multiple routes.

parameters.name: statusCode
parameters.description: Filter by HTTP status code(s) (e.g., 404, 500). Supports single value, array, or comma-separated list (e.g. statusCode=200,400).

parameters.name: legacyLimit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results (deprecated, use limit)

parameters.name: debug
parameters.description: Enable debug mode to log filters, row counts, and cap application (non-breaking, DEBUG level only)

get.description: Returns aggregated metrics for the Admin header (total requests, error rate, latency, active actors, rate limit violations).
Manually triggers aggregation of route statistics for the given time range. Populates the api_route_stats table for time-series metrics.
Returns long-term trend metrics for fixed ranges (30, 60, 90 days) with time-bucketed data and KPI summary. Uses daily buckets for ≤14 days, weekly buckets for >14 days.

parameters.name: route
parameters.description: Filter by route(s). Can be a single route or array of routes.

parameters.name: statusCode
parameters.description: Filter by status code(s). Can be a single status code or array of status codes.

200.description: Trends metrics with time-bucketed data and KPI summary

get.description: Returns all distinct routes and status codes available in api_route_stats for the given time window. Defaults to last 30 days if no dates provided.

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Start date for the time window (ISO date string). Defaults to 30 days ago if not provided.

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: End date for the time window (ISO date string). Defaults to now if not provided.

get.summary: Get available routes and error codes

avgLatencyVariability.description: Average latency variability (p99 - p50) in milliseconds

requestsPerDayDelta.description: Period-over-period delta for requests per day

routes.description: Array of distinct route paths available in the time window

errorCodes.description: Array of distinct status codes (as strings) available in the time window
